headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Solstice Advanced Mat, Raises Price Target to $95
summary: Mizuho  analyst John Roberts   maintains Solstice Advanced Mat (NASDAQ:SOLS) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $85 to $95.
